article_title: Satellite Broadband Subscriptions Hit 11.8 Million as ABI Research Projects 43 Million by 2035

content_preview.title: Satellite Broadband Subscriptions Hit 11.8 Million as ABI Research Projects 43 Million by 2035
content_preview.summary: A new ABI Research report finds that LEO satellite broadband subscriptions reached 11.8 million at the end of 2025, with SpaceX commanding 76 percent of the market, while Amazon and Eutelsat race to scale competing constellations.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

The satellite broadband industry crossed a significant threshold at the end of 2025, with total active subscriptions reaching 11.8 million and terminal shipments hitting 5.6 million units, according to [market data published by ABI Research on April 2](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/04/02/3267273/0/en/Satellite-Broadband-Reaches-an-Inflection-Point-as-Global-Subscriptions-Set-to-Exceed-43-Million-by-2035.html). The research firm projects that figure will surge past ...

editor_notes.content_quality: Good satellite broadband market overview with ABI Research data.
editor_notes.source_verification: GlobeNewsWire, CNBC, SpaceNews — all on allowlist.
